mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( title, content, name, start_date, end_date, username ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{username} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
